title: 1.1: Tests that Engine captures line number `1` when secret is placed on the very first line of the file

1.2: Tests that Engine captures line number when secret is placed after multiple empty newlines (at least 2 empty lines before secret), with the expected line number matching the secret's actual position in the test content.

1.3: Tests that Engine captures line number when secret is placed after a line of text followed by whitespace, with the expected line number matching the "secret's actual position" in the test content.
1.4: Tests that Engine captures the actual line number when secret is embedded inside a configuration block with multiple lines of content both before and after the secret.
2.1: Places the test testing Engine Workflow in pkg/engine/engine_test.go
3.1: All tests use framework Go testing with testify/assert for assertions
3.2: All tests follow the naming pattern TestEngine[Behavior].
